pull_request.title: plugin: include MFiles/SwigFiles in go list -json= filter
pull_request.body:
## Summary

The `PkgFiles` struct (added in #61) deserialises `MFiles`/`SwigFiles`/`SwigCXXFiles` and `CompileGoPackage` fails fast when they're non-empty, but the `-json=` field filter passed to `go list` at resolve.rs:312/356 omitted them — so `go list` never emitted them, the structs always defaulted to empty, and the "Objective-C/SWIG not yet supported" error never fired in default/dag mode. Packages with `.m`/`.swig` sources were silently compiled without those files.

Appends `MFiles,SwigFiles,SwigCXXFiles` to both `-json=` strings and adds a regression test that runs the real `go list` against a temp module with `.m`/`.swig`/`.swigcxx` files. The test is skipped when `GO2NIX_DEFAULT_GO` is unset at compile time (bare `cargo test`) and exercised in the nix build where it's baked in.

## Test plan

- [x] `cargo test` — 45/45 (test skips gracefully without baked-in go)
- [x] `GO2NIX_DEFAULT_GO=$(which go) cargo test run_go_list_surfaces` — passes; verified it would have failed before the fix (`go list` with the old field set returns `"MFiles":null`)
- [x] `nix build .#go2nix-nix-plugin`
- [x] `nix flake check` (formatting)

commit_summaries.message:
plugin: include MFiles/SwigFiles/SwigCXXFiles in go list -json= filter

The PkgFiles struct deserialises these fields and CompileGoPackage
fails fast on them, but the -json= field filter passed to go list
omitted them, so go list never emitted them and the structs always
defaulted to empty. Packages with Objective-C or SWIG sources were
silently compiled without those files in default mode.

Adds a regression test that runs the real go list against a temp
module with .m/.swig/.swigcxx files (skipped when GO2NIX_DEFAULT_GO
is unset, exercised in the nix build where it's baked in).

:house: Remote-Dev: homespace
